metadata.note: 补建说明：该文件为后续补建，用于记录 pretext-TUI 与主流 text wrapping primitives 的横向 benchmark 场景；当前进度：首版覆盖 full wrap、prepared resize、rich SGR 与 large page seek，作为人工测评而非发布门禁。

workloads.description: Full-document plain terminal wrapping with CJK, emoji, tabs, hard breaks, and terminal-session prose.
Repeated resize relayout over one prepared mixed-language buffer.
workloads.text: A界é😀B 👩‍💻 こんにちは 世界 ΩΩΩ\n日志行 status=ok path=/tmp/example tabs\tindent\n

workloads.description: ANSI SGR inline style wrapping with plain text materialization plus ANSI re-emission.
workloads.rawText: \u001b[31mERROR\u001b[0m service=api message=\u001b[1m世界 hello 😀\u001b[0m latency=42ms path=/var/log/app repeated text for terminal wrapping\n

workloads.description: OSC8 hyperlink metadata wrapping with URI policy and explicit ANSI re-emission.
Large fixed-column viewport page lookup, comparing range/page materialization against full-wrap-and-slice baselines.
